featuretablefilter 0.99.0

    • featuretablefilter Tutorial: Complete Guide to Microbiome Feature Table Filtering
  • Changelog

Convert feature table data.frame to TreeSummarizedExperiment

Source: R/convert_data_classes.R
to_TSE.Rd

Creates a TreeSummarizedExperiment object from a standard feature table data.frame. Optionally incorporates rowData (taxonomy), colData (sample metadata), and reduced dimensions.

to_TSE(
  table,
  rowData = NULL,
  colData = NULL,
  reducedDims = NULL,
  rowTree = NULL,
  rowLinks = NULL,
  feature_col = NULL,
  assay_name = "counts"
)

Arguments

table

A data.frame with feature IDs in the first column and samples as columns.

rowData

Optional. Feature metadata (taxonomy) as data.frame with row names matching feature IDs.

colData

Optional. Sample metadata as data.frame with row names matching sample names.

reducedDims

Optional. Named list of matrices for reduced dimension representations.

rowTree

Optional. Phylogenetic tree (phylo object) with tip labels matching feature IDs.

rowLinks

Optional. Data frame linking features to tree nodes.

feature_col

Name or index of the column containing feature IDs. Default is "feature_id" or 1.

assay_name

Name for the assay. Default is "counts".

Value

A TreeSummarizedExperiment object with the assay data and optional metadata.

Examples

if (requireNamespace("TreeSummarizedExperiment", quietly = TRUE)) {
  data(example_feature_table)
  tse <- to_TSE(example_feature_table)
  print(tse)
}
#> class: TreeSummarizedExperiment 
#> dim: 50 20 
#> metadata(0):
#> assays(1): counts
#> rownames(50): ASV_001 ASV_002 ... ASV_049 ASV_050
#> rowData names(0):
#> colnames(20): Sample_001 Sample_002 ... Sample_019 Sample_020
#> colData names(0):
#> reducedDimNames(0):
#> mainExpName: NULL
#> altExpNames(0):
#> rowLinks: NULL
#> rowTree: NULL
#> colLinks: NULL
#> colTree: NULL
